General.Name: Raymond Industrial Ltd
General.Description: Raymond Industrial Limited, together with its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, and sells electrical home appliances in Asia, Europe, Latin America, North America, and internationally. It offers environmental products, batteries, health and personal care products, and kitchen products, as well as other small and medium-sized electrical household appliances. The company is also involved in property holding activities. Raymond Industrial Limited was incorporated in 1964 and is headquartered in Sha Tin, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Grandtech Centre, Sha Tin, Hong Kong
